description: Auto-emit one Dagster asset per (spreadsheet, tab) in a Drive folder. StateBackedComponent — discovery cached to disk. Materializing reads the tab's values via the Sheets API and returns a DataFrame (header row treated as column names).

credentials_json_env_var.label: Service-Account JSON Env Var
credentials_json_env_var.description: Env var containing the full service-account credentials JSON (needs Drive + Sheets read scopes).

folder_id.label: Drive Folder ID
folder_id.description: Restrict discovery to spreadsheets in this Drive folder. Omit for all spreadsheets shared with the service account.

header_row.label: Header Row (1-indexed)
header_row.description: Row number to treat as column headers. Set to 0 to skip header handling.
